notes: Colmi R09 V2 big-data temperature. Same V2 channel format as JStyle (BC 25 + length LE16 + day blocks). Layout: BC 25 <len_lo> <len_hi> <day_marker> <day_marker> | day_block: [days_ago][0x1E sep][48 half-hour bytes]. temp_c = (byte/10)+20. R09 sends partial-day blocks with mostly zeros plus actual readings (A6=36.6°C, A7=36.7°C, A5=36.5°C, A8=36.8°C). Body-temp range physiological 33.5-38°C.
